curation_notes: Patch commit is a merge commit fixing GHSA-j2x6-9323-fp7h. Five non-test source files were changed (noisy patch). Primary vulnerability location is _unpack_returndata in external_call.py, which failed to validate return data bounds when used in complex expressions. Secondary location is needs_clamp in core.py, which incorrectly skipped clamping for JSON_ABI-encoded bytestrings. Locations derived from both the advisory description (which describes the missing bounds check on external call returns in complex expressions) and the patch diff.
